boundary: software analogy only; not biological equivalence, not wetlab, not protein/RNA/DNA design

sources.name: AlphaFold 2
sources.lesson: sequence plus evolutionary/context signals can support structure prediction, but prediction requires confidence and validation boundaries

sources.name: AlphaFold 3
sources.lesson: joint structure and interaction prediction motivates multi-object agent fold modeling across memory, tools, claims, and environment

sources.name: DNA to RNA expression
sources.lesson: encoded instructions are expressed through intermediate transcripts before functional products appear

sources.name: RNA folding with learned and thermodynamic constraints
sources.lesson: fold prediction should combine learned or heuristic scores with explicit constraints to reduce overfit

mappings.software_meaning: declared operational substrate: prompts, tools, permissions, constraints, evidence, lineage
runtime expression trace created from activated instructions, memory, tools, claims, and gates
event-level intermediate between declared genome and observed behavior
software behavior summary derived from fold evidence
detected drift, unsupported claim, unsafe tool path, evidence gap, or compounding risk
bounded local score over task success, evidence grounding, origin alignment, safety margin, and claim discipline
only validated deltas may become future input

prohibited_claims: AgentFold models proteins, RNA, DNA, or wetlab systems
